author: fwyzard
body:
#### PR description:

Do not duplicate MPI communicator on every event.
Remove some of the synchronisation points between local and remote processes.

Add support for sending different parts of the event processing to separate remote processes.

#### PR validation:

MPI unit tests pass.

#### Backport status:

Backport of #50461 to 16.0.x for online NGT tests.
title: Improve the use of MPI communicators [16.0.x]
